metadata.Description: Listens to GatherBuddy Reborn/Vulcan execution plans, detects missing drop-only materials using Vulcan/GatherBuddy mob-drop locations with local fallbacks, waits for GBR gathering to finish, equips a selected combat job, routes to the hunted monster, supports selectable RotationSolverReborn or WrathCombo combat drivers, and resumes Vulcan automatically.
